title: panel
text: panel A type of global object that contains buttons to execute structure editor functions and operations on the active form or application shell of a desktop application. Panels are typically used to create toolbars for form components, and pop-up menus and floating panels for application shells. Related Links Panels Panels are global objects that are typically used to create toolbars for form components and application shells. They contain buttons to execute structure editor functions and activate component operations. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
